title: Fixed Price vs Day-Ahead Indexed PPAs in the UK Market
snippet:
Explore the pros, cons and scenarios for fixed-price vs day-ahead indexed PPAs in the UK’s evolving renewable energy landscape

The post Fixed Price vs Day-Ahead Indexed PPAs in the UK Market appeared first on Energy Live News.
ai_summary: Direct exploration of PPA structures (fixed vs indexed) that are core to tem's business model and pricing strategy for I&C customers and generators.
ai_reasoning: PPAs are fundamental to tem's value proposition for both renewable generators and I&C offtakers. This trade press article directly addresses product positioning and market scenarios tem must navigate and compete on. High relevance for strategy and sales messaging.
